label: Ebonwake Transit Spire
description: Ebonwake Transit Spire functions as a fortified void-traffic nexus in Imperium Nihilus, built as a basalt-clad arcology around a narrow launch shaft and armored docking collars. Its interior concourses follow strict Imperial transit geometry, with sainted lintels, numbered bulkhead-seals, and vox-pylons hardwired to rationed emergency channels. Shielded gallery windows overlook blast-scarred aprons where landing lights burn through persistent empyrean haze, and the air remains metallic with promethium residue. Checkpoints, quarantine screens, and chapel-bay shrines define the circulation of all cargo and passengers under constant threat of raider incursion and warp-born contamination.
